notableEvents.detail: Max Kepler flies out sharply to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno grounds into a double play, shortstop Cooper Pratt to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Gabriel Moreno out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio singles on a ground ball to pitcher Ryan Thompson. Blake Perkins scores. Cooper Pratt scores. Christian Yelich to 3rd. Jackson Chourio to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Ryan Thompson.
